title: Best AI Logo Makers for 2026
description: The top AI-powered logo design tools compared, tested, and ranked for startups, agencies, and personal brands.
content: Creating a professional logo used to cost thousands of dollars and weeks of back-and-forth with designers. Today, AI logo makers can generate dozens of options in minutes based on your preferences.

Looka remains the leader in this space. It generates logos based on your style preferences, colors, and symbols. The brand kit add-on includes social media templates, business card designs, and brand guidelines. For $20 one-time, it is an unbeatable value for startups.
When choosing an AI logo maker, consider whether you need just a logo or a full brand kit. Also check if the tool allows post-purchase editing, as many lock your design after payment.

title: Top 10 AI UI Design Tools for Figma Users
description: AI-powered plugins and tools that integrate directly into your Figma workflow to speed up design.
content: Figma is the design tool of choice for most product designers, and AI is now deeply integrated into the workflow. From generating first drafts to creating icons and copy, these tools eliminate repetitive work.

Figma AI (native) is the most seamless option. It generates first drafts, creates images, and searches assets using natural language. Because it is native, it understands your design system and components.

Magician is the best plugin for ideation. It generates icons, copy, and images from prompts without leaving your canvas. The icon generation is particularly impressive for quickly mocking up UI elements.
Framer is the best choice when you need to go from design to a live website. Its AI generates layouts and copy, and you can publish directly from the canvas.
Uizard is unique because it turns sketches into UI. Upload a hand-drawn wireframe and get an editable mockup in seconds. Perfect for rapid prototyping.

title: Best Free AI Photo Editors: The Complete Comparison
description: We tested every free AI photo editing tool so you do not have to. Here are the winners.
content: AI has democratized photo editing. Tasks that once required Photoshop expertise, like background removal, relighting, and generative fill, can now be done in one click.

Remove.bg is the single best tool for background removal. The free tier handles low-resolution images, and the accuracy on hair and fur is unmatched. For designers who regularly need cutouts, it is essential.
Clipdrop by Stability AI offers a full suite of AI editing tools, including relighting, upscaling, and generative fill. The free tier is generous, and the API is affordable for developers.

Adobe Firefly is the safest choice for commercial work. Because it is trained on Adobe Stock and public domain content, you can use the output without legal concerns. The free tier gives 25 credits per month.
